verses.text: Moab mite in Jerusalem-a om gam ukpa tungah sehnel gam Sela khua panin tuunote a puak uh hi
A bu a kipaih khiatsak ciangin a cihna ding theiloin a leng kawikawi vasate bangin Arnon guntui ngahmunah Moab mite om uh hi

Amaute in Judah mite kiangah, “Kote tungah thuhoih hong lak un la, thutangin hong gamta un. Sunkim laitaka singliim bangin kote hong liah un. A kihawlkhia kote hong seel un la, galtai kote hong hek kei un

A kihawlkhia ko Moab mite note lakah hong tengsak un la, kote hong susiate' kiang panin kote' belh hong hi un. A nengniampa om nawnloin siatna hun beita a, a khe tawh a sik mipa gamsung panin a man'than' ciangin
itna kip tawh kumpi tokhom khat kiphut ding a, thuman sep ding a manlang, thutang zongin thu a khen mipa pen David' buk sunga om tua tokhom tungah thuman tawh tu ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah mite in, “Moab' kiphatsakna thu i za khinta hi. Amah kiphasak mahmah hi. A kiliatsakna, a kiphatsakna, a kihihsakna, ama kisialhnate khempeuh a mawkna ahi hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin a thuakna uh hangin Moab mite kap hen la, mi khempeuh zong Moab mite' hangin kap ta uh hen. Nakpi takin gimna a thuak laitakun Kirhareseth khua-ah a anlim nekte uh a phawkkhak uh ciangin khasia-in a kap uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a hiang zai-in tuipi kantan a, Jazer khua banin sehnel gam dongah a zaam ama hiangte, minam dangte' tote in sattan ahih manin Heshbon lolaite leh Sibmah leengguite vul ta uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Jazer khua mite a kah bangin Sibmah leengguite' hangin kei ka kap hi. Heshbon leh Elealeh khuamite aw, ka khitui tawh note kong kawtsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh galkidona in note' singgah leh ante hong banzo hi

An tampi a pian' ngeina lolai-ah lungdamna leh nuamna om nawnlo hi. Leenggui lote-ah lasakna omlo a, lungdama kikona om nawnlo hi. Leenggah cilna-ah kuamah in leengtui suk nawnlo a, leenggah lawh cianga kikona aw kidaisak ta hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moab gam hangin laia lasakna bangin ka lungsim kisat gaihgaih a, Kirhareseth khuapi hangin keimahmah zong ka kisat gaihgaih hi
Moab amahmah hong kilaakin, a sangna munah lungkhamin hong pai a, ama siangtho munah thu a nget ciangin bangmah ngahlo ding hi
Hih bang thu pen Topa in a beisa hun lai-in Moab tawh kisai-in a gensa thu ahi hi

Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in, “Nasem dingin a kicial kum hunte sung bangin, kum thum sungin, ama mihon tampite om ta se leh Moab' minthan'na in simmawhna thuak ding a, a suakta lai mite pen tawm mahmahin, thanem ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
